name: vn-pho-bowl
notes: Photo fixture — calibrated to match vn-smoke/pho.json metadata (USDA + VN MOH 2017). Uses TINY_PNG_BASE64 (1×1 white PNG) as input per Path A in briefing §6.4 — MSW Gemini stub does NOT inspect image bytes; vision route's input-parsing + tolerance contract is the test target. Image-validation branches (>500kb, magic-byte sniff) covered by ai-vision.test.ts and log-flow-thumbnail-magic-bytes.test.ts.
